name: play
notes: Use for the single dominant play action; pair with a solid primary button.

name: settings
notes: Use as icon-only control with accessible label and tooltip.

name: shopping-cart
notes: Use for shop entry or cart; avoid if the screen is an inventory-only flow.

name: package
notes: Use for inventory bundle rewards or generic item collections.

name: sword
notes: Use for melee attack/weapon category; do not use for destructive app actions.

name: shield
notes: Use for guard/armor/protection states.

name: zap
notes: Use for speed/dash/energy
column9: but avoid overusing for every exciting action.

name: flask-conical
notes: Use for potion/consumable/science settings.

notes: Use for health or favorite; add label/number for critical HUD.

name: coins
notes: Use for game currency; do not rely on color alone.

name: lock
notes: Use with visible reason

name: check

name: alert-triangle
notes: Use for warning states; keep color semantics stable.

name: x
